assertions.text: Response explicitly flags that JUnit 5.10.0 is below the required minimum (5.11) and recommends upgrading
assertions.evidence: result.md lines 20-21: 'Your project currently has JUnit Jupiter 5.10.0, but TableTest requires JUnit Jupiter 5.11 or higher. You will need to upgrade your existing JUnit dependency'

assertions.text: Response provides the tabletest dependency with groupId 'org.tabletest' (not guessed)

assertions.evidence: result.md line 12: '<scope>test</scope>' within the tabletest-junit dependency block
